title: NASA Finds Ancient Water Clues Locked Inside a Cosmic Time Capsule
description: NASA found evidence of ancient water on asteroid Donaldjohanson, offering new clues about the early solar system.

title: Boy, 12, finds ancient gemstone at biblical site linked to Jesus' miracles
description: A 12-year-old schoolboy has made an extraordinary discovery at an important biblical site, after he found a rare 1500 year gem stone while on a school organised archaeological dig

title: Libyan archaeologists battle to save ancient Greek ruins in east of country
description: The sites at Cyrene and Apollonia were first targeted by jihadists following the fall of Muammar Gaddafi and then ravaged by Storm Daniel in 2023.

title: When power echoes ancient accusations: A warning from the field
description: Public proclamations do not end when a political speech ends; they continue to affect perception and behavior long after the moment passes.

title: Budget sends strongest solar signal yet, but fossil fuel bias remains: Sanem
description: Sanem highlighted a gap between Bangladesh's renewable energy targets and budget allocations
